description_long: This is a menacing, fantasy-inspired sword with a jagged, organic design, predominantly colored in deep crimson and dark red hues. The blade is long, double-edged, and tapers to a sharp, pointed tip, featuring irregular, almost thorn-like protrusions along its length. The hilt is integrated into the blade's form, with a guard that curves outward in claw-like shapes, giving the weapon a sinister, almost demonic appearance. The handle is relatively short and appears textured, blending seamlessly into the rest of the sword, and lacks any visible wrapping or grip material. The entire object has a rough, almost chiseled surface, suggesting it is forged from a single piece of material. There are no visible engravings, jewels, or additional ornamentation, emphasizing its brutal, utilitarian aesthetic.
description: A jagged, crimson double-edged sword with thorn-like protrusions and a clawed guard, featuring a rough, organic design and no visible ornamentation.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the sword, highlighting the jagged blade, claw-like guard, and textured handle.
description_view_1: Edge-on view revealing the thinness of the blade and handle, with minimal visible detail except the silhouette.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring view 0, again displaying the jagged blade, clawed guard, and rough surface.
description_view_3: Edge-on view from the opposite side, showing the narrow profile and the pointed tip of the blade.
attribute_handle_design: short, integrated, textured, no visible wrapping or pommel
